case_title: LEONA MONFORTE VS. BRANDY HO & BROTHERS, INC.

TRIAL RESET TO FEB-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-19-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: [X] THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-19-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE BY TELEPHONE TO THE COURT IS GRANTED BY JUDGE MITCHELL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT WITH NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONFORTE, LEONA
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2017 BY JPT CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF LEONA MONFORTE IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT BRANDY HO & BORTHER, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JACK HO, MANAGER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURT THAT HE DID RECEIVE A COPY OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

DBA BRANDY HO'S RESTAURANT/JACK S. K. HO $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
